---
title: ""
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: false
listing:
  contents: posts
  sort: "date desc"
  type: default
  categories: true
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
  feed: true
  date-format: "MMM YYYY"
---

::: {.hero}
<div class="hero-mark">101</div>
<div class="hero-tagline">Quant &amp; AI, from first principles</div>
<div class="hero-intro">
Notes on portfolio risk, simulation, and the LLM systems built on top of them —
written by [Manu Rathi](about.qmd), Director (Research) at Windmill Capital.
See also: [what I've built](projects.qmd).
</div>
:::
